label_verbatim: (Check box only if applicable.) This is a professional corporation pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A**
rationale: Top-left opt-in checkbox; mirrors MBCA-6's professional-corporation election but on the foreign-qualification form. Triggers the FOURTH paragraph's professional-corporation recitations and the footnote naming requirements (must contain 'chartered', 'professional corporation', 'professional association', 'service corporation' or 'P.C.', 'P.A.', 'S.C.').

label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation in Jurisdiction of Incorporation)
rationale: Foreign corporation's legal name in its home jurisdiction; same key family as MLLC-12 / FICT-4 (foreign-entity-name convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...a fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Fictitious name used in Maine when the home name does not meet 13-C §401 or 13-C Chapter 22-A §736 requirements, or when the home name is unavailable in Maine. Same key as MLLC-12 / FICT-4.

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] Commercial Registered Agent
rationale: Mutually-exclusive 'commercial' option for the SECOND registered-agent block.

label_verbatim: CRA Public Number
rationale: Right-aligned narrow blank on the Commercial Registered Agent row.

label_verbatim: (name of commercial registered agent)
[ ] Noncommercial Registered Agent
(name of noncommercial registered agent)
(physical location, P.O. Box - street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address for the registered agent. Note: form's parenthetical does NOT prohibit P.O. Box for foreign-qualification (unlike MLLC-12 SECOND which says 'not P.O. Box') — confirm against statute, but treating as combined address.

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above)
FIFTH: Its jurisdiction of incorporation is ___ (state or country)
rationale: Home state or country of incorporation. Same key family as MLLC-12 / CLKRA-3 / FICT-4.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ...and the date of incorporation is
rationale: Date of incorporation in home jurisdiction. Same key as MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: Address of the principal office, wherever located, is: ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the principal office (may be outside Maine). Same key as MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address of the principal office. Same key as MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH row 1: (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: First director/officer slot, name+capacity combined widget. Form lists 'current directors and officers' with 3 inline rows; further rows attached as additional pages.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH row 1: Street ___ (street or mailing address)
rationale: First officer's street/mailing address (upper-right cell of row 1).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH row 1: ___ (city, state and zip code)
rationale: First officer's city/state/zip combined (lower-right cell of row 1).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH row 2: (type or print name and capacity)
SEVENTH row 2: Street ___ (street or mailing address)
SEVENTH row 2: ___ (city, state and zip code)
SEVENTH row 3: (type or print name and capacity)
SEVENTH row 3: Street ___ (street or mailing address)
SEVENTH row 3: ___ (city, state and zip code)
Dated ___
rationale: Date of officer's signature (EIGHTH signature block).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (original signature of an officer) / (type or print name and capacity/title)
rationale: Signer printed-name-and-capacity widget; label combines 'capacity/title' but the canonical Shape-D (matching MLLC-12, MBCA-11) collapses both onto printed_name_and_capacity. The form's signature footnote restricts authorized signers to officers per 13-C MRSA §1121.5.
